title: Added Manage-Only Change History Report
summary: Replaced the long site change-log archives with compact migration stubs and added a manage-only Docs Viewer report for browsing structured docs-log entries by domain.
effect: Detailed change history now lives in structured JSONL records with local generated projections, while public docs stay compact and manage mode provides the richer browsing surface.
verification: 18 focused pytest checks passed; Studio docs/search rebuilds passed; temporary docs-management endpoint returned 469 generated change-history entries.
